prestazioni: Engine: EJ205 (2.0L DOHC 16V Turbo) with forged internals including Manley forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 500+ WHP reliability on E85.
Turbocharger: Garrett GT3076R (76mm, .63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch divorced wastegate dump tube and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control up to 28 PSI.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, Aeromotive A1000 fuel pressure regulator, and a custom -8AN fuel rail setup with braided stainless lines for E85 compatibility.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Rocket Bunny V1 GC8 kit with carbon fiber overfenders, custom extended steel rear quarter panels, and relocated rear bumper support for 9.5-inch wheel fitment (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear on Work Meister S1 3P wheels).
Aero: Voltex Type-5 rear wing with custom 3D-printed aluminum mounts and a Seibon carbon fiber front lip splitter with integrated canards for balanced downforce at 120+ mph.

Interior: Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats with custom GC8-specific mounting brackets, Takata 4-point harnesses, and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub for rally-inspired ergonomics.
